---
title: 'Preston''s Blog'
date: '2010-12-07T16:51:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Reserved for Preston'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1530617420869345303'
blogger_filename: '/2010/12/prestons-blog.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Reserved for Preston/feed.atom'
---

I'm reserving this URL for you to use some day.
